summary: MLBN MVPD Messaging - Unauthorized and Entitled
description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND MLBN broadcasters are assigned
AND the user has one of the following entitlements: MLBALL, MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS, MLBVIDEOAR
AND the user is unauthorized for MLBN MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = false
AND the AWAY (National) feed level mlbnAuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game tile for an MLBN Postseason game tile
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Select modal displays
AND MLBN MVPD messaging displays in the Feed Select modal
